creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
I get this upon build on the latest kde ,4.x-stable and xfree86-4.0.3_3

tried /usr/X11R6/lib
configure:4685: c++ -o conftest  -O -pipe -march=k6 -frtti 
-I/usr/X11R6/include/qt2 -I/usr/X11R6/include  -I/usr/include 
-D_GETOPT_H -D_PTH_H_ -D_PTH_PTHREAD_H_  -I/usr/local/include 
-I/tmp/ktel/include -I/usr/X11R6/include/qt2 -L -L/usr/X11R6/lib  
-L/usr/local/lib conftest.C -Wl,-export-dynamic -L/usr/local/lib 
-L/usr/X11R6/lib -ljpeg -lgcc -lstdc++ -lqt2 -lpng -lz -lm  -lXext 
-lX11  1>&5
configure:4878: checking for moc
configure:4979: checking for rpath
configure:5008: checking for KDE
(end of "config.log")
*** Error code 1
 
Stop in /usr/home/poseiden/port/kdetelnet.
